risks.why: Deterministic update/orchestration checks passed and no causal-rule failures surfaced in strict runs.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Preserve deterministic fixtures and keep event-to-effect mappings explicit as taxonomy expands.

risks.why: Interaction truth firewall and emergence channel/mode boundaries are verified and green.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Require boundary assertions for every newly introduced emergence source surface.

risks.why: Relationship axis normalization and progression determinism remain stable under verification.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Add scenario snapshots if relationship-event breadth increases.

risks.why: Source restrictions, cap behavior, and leakage guard checks pass.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Keep source-type allowlists and reader/canonical isolation tests synchronized with model changes.

risks.why: Temporal evolution remains trigger-gated and non-continuous in tested paths.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Enforce threshold checks for any new temporal trigger kind.

risks.why: Orchestrator boundedness checks pass and no unbounded payload behavior was detected.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Maintain explicit cap assertions whenever bundle fields are expanded.

risks.why: Coverage is currently strong but relies on continued maintenance of umbrella emergence command composition.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Keep verify:narrative-emergence as a required gate in strict certification runners.

risks.why: Verification breadth is expanding, increasing ownership and upkeep coordination load.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Track command ownership and required coverage in build docs each chunk.

nonBlockingFollowUps: Migrate Prisma config off package.json#prisma before Prisma 7.
Add contract-registry governance for NarrativeEmergenceBundle if/when it becomes an external persisted contract.
